title: Duplicated threads in performance_schema.threads table
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_threads (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), thread_os_id INT NOT NULL);
SELECT id, name, thread_os_id FROM test_threads WHERE thread_os_id IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, name FROM test_threads WHERE thread_os_id IN (SELECT thread_os_id FROM test_threads WHERE name LIKE 'thread/innodb/%');
key_bug_features: Duplicate threads due to shared thread_os_id
